scene: Teen Byte waking up to golden-pink morning light, transitioning from night sleep to active morning at the desk

subjects.description: Teen Byte: gangly proportions with long limbs, big expressive eyes now open and alert, fluffy pixel-art form with dithered shading
subjects.position: centered at desk in primary foreground
subjects.action: sitting upright at desk, freshly awake, body oriented toward laptop with eager anticipation

subjects.description: anchor environment: wooden desk with oversized silver laptop open and glowing, Chicago skyline window behind showing morning cityscape
subjects.position: room background with window to the left
subjects.action: static environment anchor with laptop humming

style: pixel art, clean 2D forms, dithered shading, readable silhouette
lighting: warm golden-pink morning light streaming through Chicago window, bright and hopeful, transitioning from night darkness
mood: ecstatic and energized, six-day streak confidence, morning freshness after restful sleep
background: Chicago skyline visible through window in morning light, trophy shelf above desk with single golden 10-day trophy on left and green leafy plant on right, food bowl on floor to the right with moderate kibble, cozy bed tucked away
composition: Byte centered at desk, laptop dominant in frame, window providing left-side lighting, shelf balanced above
